title: Question types and interfaces for MCP UI handling
purpose: Defines the TypeScript interfaces and types for representing questions, responses, and UI rendering parameters used in the MCP system for handling user interactions.
module_context: Exports multiple TypeScript interfaces and types related to question handling, UI rendering, and session management in the MCP system.

methods.name: receiveQuestion
methods.normalized_params: (id: string, ui: UINode, context?: string): void

steps.content: Store the new question with its unique identifier and UI definition.
Set the question as the currently pending question.
Add the question to the session's question history.
Open the question panel for user interaction.
Retrieve the currently pending question from storage.
Update the pending question with the provided response data.
Send the response back to Claude via the MCP system.
Remove the question from the pending state.
Add the answered question to the session's question history.
Retrieve the currently pending question from storage.
Mark the question as answered with no response data.
Remove the question from the pending state.
Add the dismissed question to the session's question history.
Clear all questions from the session's question history.
Reset the pending question to null.
